► ACCURATE ANSWERS, STEP-BY-STEP

► AI LIVE TUTOR, VOICE & WHITEBOARD
Stuck on a question? With AI Live Tutor, ask by voice anytime and see problems explained clearly on a live whiteboard—just like having a personal tutor by your side.

Got messy notes or long lectures? With AI Study Converter, upload class notes, photos, audio, or YouTube links — and instantly get personalized quizzes & flashcards to help you learn faster and boost your GPA. No extra work, just better results.

Simply take a photo of your problem, and Gauth will recognize it and crop your question automatically. After uploading, our experts will provide solutions in a few seconds with well-formatted answers and explanations. With Gauth, we hope you can find homework is also fun and easy to understand!

results.description:
Photomath is known worldwide for helping millions of learners to learn, practice, and understand math – one step at a time. 

Scan any math problem with the Photomath app to get step-by-step explanations with accurate solutions and a variety of teacher-approved methods. Math is about the process, so Photomath breaks your problem into bite-sized steps to help you understand the “what” and “why” along with the “how.” Whether you’re learning basic arithmetic or advanced geometry, we’ll tackle it together, step by step. 

Why Photomath? 

Billions of math problems: From elementary arithmetic to advanced calculus and everything in between, Photomath can solve billions of math problems—including word problems! Whether handwritten, in a textbook, or on a screen, Photomath is here to help you untangle your trickiest problem.

Step-by-step explanations: Math isn’t just about an answer. It’s about every step along the way. That’s why Photomath breaks down each step, so you can *really* learn. Less guesswork = less stress, especially with our new Animated Steps, which show you the exact progression of a particular step. Get basic step-by-step explanations at no charge when you download Photomath.

Expert-developed methods: Photomath’s educational content is centered around the learner’s experience, driven by the expertise of our own team of mathematicians and former math teachers. 

Self-paced learning: Photomath’s instant support is like having a 24/7 virtual tutor. Checking your homework before dinner? Stuck on a problem at 2am? We can help. Follow our detailed steps, taking whatever time you need to review definitions, rationale, and more – all within the explanation.

Want to dive deeper and explore more ways to learn? Photomath Plus can get you there with custom Animated Tutorials, detailed Textbook Solutions, and more! 

KEY FEATURES
• Step-by-step explanations included in our basic version (at no charge)
• Word problem instructions
• Interactive graphs
• Video learning
• Multiple solution methods
• Advanced scientific calculator

Photomath is for learners of all levels, including those studying:
Numbers & Quantity
Algebra
Functions
Trigonometry & Angles
Sequences
Geometry
Calculus

“The step-by-step guide is beneficial to students that do not have access to a tutor and struggle with solving math problems.” — Forbes

“A viral video about a new app looks like a dream come true for anyone who struggles with math.” — Time

Ace your finals with confidence: Solvely offers advanced, high-accuracy AI study support trusted by over 10M students worldwide. Multiple AI models work together to cross-check each answer, providing reliable 24/7 help for all subjects at any level.

Key Features:
► ACCURATE AI ANSWERS
Solvely provides clear, step-by-step explanations with the reasoning behind each solution. Each answer is checked by multiple AI models to improve accuracy and reduce mistakes.

► PHOTO TO ANSWER
Take a photo of a problem from a textbook, worksheet, notebook, or whiteboard and receive a detailed breakdown in seconds. This turns stuck moments into clear, learnable steps.

► ALL SUBJECTS
Support is available across Math, Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Statistics, and more. Solvely helps you keep up in class, prepare for tests, and review key concepts at your own pace.

► MATCHES YOUR LEVEL
Solvely adapts to your level, from middle school to college and beyond. Explanations are adjusted to your background to fill knowledge gaps and build long-term understanding.

►  SMART AI NOTE TAKER
Let smart AI Note do the heavy lifting by transcribing content and extracting key takeaways, so you can stay focused—even when the professor moves fast. Turn notes into instant quizzes, flashcards, and a podcast-style recap, and import almost any format—YouTube videos, PDFs, slides, web pages, recordings, and more—to convert content into study-ready materials in seconds.

► ALL-IN-ONE STUDY APP
Solvely includes Smart Reader, Writing Assistant, AI Note-Taking, Focus Mode, and Calculator in one app. This setup helps you manage assignments, stay organized, and support your overall academic performance.

► SYNC ACROSS DEVICES
Study progress, notes, and solutions stay synced across iPhone and iPad. You can move between home, campus, and anywhere else without losing your place.

► SUBJECTS WE COVER
• Mathematics (Elementary to Advanced)
• Sciences (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
• Humanities (English, Literature, History)
• Test Prep (SAT®, ACT®, AP®, GRE®)
• Others

► MATH & SCIENCE TOOLS
Solvely makes math and science study faster and less stressful. Snap homework or practice problems and get accurate, step-by-step support you can follow. Built-in tools like an algebra calculator and a statistics calculator help with everything from everyday exercises to advanced topics. Need help beyond math? Solvely can also support chemistry and other science questions—so you can keep moving anytime, 24/7.

► SIMILAR APPS YOU MAY KNOW
If you have tried apps like Socratic, Mathway, Microsoft Math Solver, or Photomath, you will find that Solvely follows the same simple “snap and solve” flow while focusing more on clear, step-by-step explanations and deeper understanding.

► STUDY IMPACT
Many students report a clearer understanding and better academic performance after studying with Solvely. Millions of learners use Solvely to build stronger, more consistent study habits.

► With Solvely UNLIMITED, you will get:
• Unlimited, in-depth explanations
• More advanced problem-solving capabilities
• Interactive learning support
• AI-powered lecture notes
• Expanded practice materials
• Priority support when you need help

Find the most relevant and accurate information instantly. With built-in web search, Nerd AI ensures you have access to the answers and resources you need to excel in your studies.

Save time and grasp the key points of any YouTube video in seconds. Nerd AI extracts and presents concise summaries so you can stay informed without watching the entire video.

results.description:
This is Solvo—your AI homework helper and math solver for every subject.

Trusted by over a million students, parents, and tutors around the world, Solvo turns tough assignments into step-by-step learning moments. Got a homework problem, a big exam coming up, or a topic that just won’t click? The app breaks it all down so you can walk away with a solid understanding, not just a good grade.

With Solvo, you can:
- Scan and solve problems in math, chemistry, physics, and biology.
- Learn through detailed, step-by-step explanations that reveal the “why” behind every answer.
- Create AI flashcards from notes, textbooks, or research papers to study your way.
- Summarize documents, videos, and web pages so you can focus on what actually matters.
- Get instant, accurate answers—over 10 million problems solved and counting.

Here’s how Solvo helps you study:

● SNAP A PHOTO, GET THE ANSWER
Capture a photo of any problem, and Solvo will recognize it and walk you through a clear, detailed solution. From equations to essay prompts, one snap is all it takes.


● MASTER MATH STEP BY STEP
Solvo’s math solver handles everything from school-level algebra to university calculus. Algebra, trigonometry, geometry, linear algebra, logic, statistics, quadratic equations, linear functions—every answer is explained step by step so you can follow along and build real understanding.


● ACE EVERY SUBJECT AND TEST
Chemistry formulas, biology concepts, physics equations, multiple-choice quizzes: Solvo covers them all. Type or scan your question, and get a guided explanation that actually helps you learn.

● ASK ANYTHING, LEARN INSTANTLY
Type your question and get guided help from AI. Solve math problems, get science answers, write and rewrite essays, or chat through any subject you’re studying.


● BUILD FLASHCARDS FAST
Turn your notes, textbook pages, or even full research papers into interactive flashcards with a single snap. Prefer to build your own? Fill them in yourself for a more hands-on study session. Either way, you’re set for test day.


● SUMMARIZE WHAT MATTERS MOST
Paste a link, upload a document, or drop in a web page—Solvo pulls out the essentials so you can focus on key points without missing a thing.

Homework doesn’t have to be a struggle. Download Solvo and make studying easier. 

And if you'd really like to be unstoppable in class, consider Premium! A subscription gives you:
• Unlimited access
• In-depth answers
• Advanced text recognition (OCR)
• Instant responses

Subscriptions are auto-renewed based on your selected plan.
